prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约948名、1197名、1630名、1185名、1599名，整体波动较大，近两年呈后移趋势；2025年基准位次约1599名。
2. 【招生计划】该校在云南理科（物理类）招生计划2021年73人、2022年75人、2023年74人、2024年75人、2025年79人，2026年计划72人，较2025年缩招7人，竞争略有缓解。
3. 【学校层次】985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第18名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2022–2023年因土木工程专业在河南等地投档线 暴跌出现明显负面舆情，2025年声誉评价仍偏负面；2026年声誉偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音热度总排名第26位（较热），关注度中等偏上；土木工程A+、 城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、建筑学A等17个学科获评A-及以上，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；土木建筑类专业持续劝退；云南省2026年高考总人数约37.79万，较2025年约28.57万大幅增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；2026年，；同济大学位于上海，对西南地区考生吸引力较强；该校在云南招生计划占比较小，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1599名 、2026年缩招7人（位次前移约85名）与云南省考生总数大幅增长约32%（竞争加剧）的相反作用，以及声誉偏负面、抖音关注度较热等因素，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前 移但幅度有限；预测最低位次约1544名，区间1265–1823名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（国豪精英班）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 医学试验班（含临床医学、口腔医学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息与智能网联类，含计算机、人工智能等）
- 理科试验班（含数学、物理、统计等）
- 工科试验班（智慧建造与低碳环境类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智能化制造与新能源类）
- 工科试验班（城市、建筑与创意设计类）
- 经济管理试验班。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1265–1823名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（信息类、理科试验班），一档专业（国豪精英班、临床医学）作为冲刺，三档专业（智能化制造、经济管理）作为 稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 948, 1197, 1630, 1185, and 1599 respectively, showing significant fluctuations with a backward trend in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1599.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Yunnan was 73 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 75 in 2024, 79 in 2025, and planned 72 in 2026, a reduction of 7 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.
3. [University Level] 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: From 2022 to 2023, due to a sharp drop in admission scores for civil engineering in Henan and other regions, there was significant negative public opinion; the reputation evaluation in 2025 remains somewhat negative; in 2026, the reputation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; Douyin popularity ranks 26th overall (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention; 17 disciplines including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Architecture A, etc., have been rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended; Civil Engineering and Architecture majors continue to be discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan college entrance exam is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 285,700 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; in 2026,; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with strong appeal to candidates from the southwest region; its enrollment plan in Yunnan accounts for a relatively small proportion, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1599 in 2025, the reduction of 7 students in 2026 (ranking forward by about 85), and the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Yunnan (intensified competition) with opposite effects, along with a somewhat negative reputation and relatively hot Douyin attention, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be slightly forward compared to 2025 but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1544, with a range of 1265–1823.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (including Clinical Medicine, Stomatology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information and Intelligent Networking, including Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (including Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Low-Carbon Environment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Urban, Architecture and Creative Design)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 1265–1823, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Information, Science Experimental Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Guohao Elite Class, Clinical Medicine) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing, Economics and Management) as a safe backup. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 358, 381, 379, 355, and 325, showing a fluctuating forward trend, with a baseline ranking of about 325 in 2025; the enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Yunnan was 17 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, with a planned 11 in 2026, a reduction of 1 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide; recent reputation evaluations are somewhat negative, mainly involving engineering incidents such as the gap in civil engineering, which have limited direct impact on liberal arts majors; Douyin popularity ranks 26th overall (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention; liberal arts-related disciplines such as Foreign Language and Literature (A-) and Marxist Theory (A-) are rated A-, while majors like Law and Political Science rely on the university's comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has social popularity but with differentiation and wait-and-see attitude; humanities and social science majors have stable popularity; the total number of Yunnan college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 285,700 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates from the southwestern region; the university has very few enrollment slots for liberal arts in Yunnan, making it a highly competitive cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 325 in 2025, the reduction of 1 enrollment slot in 2026 (ranking forward by about 16 places), and the opposite effect of a significant 32% increase in the total number of candidates in Yunnan (intensifying competition), along with stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be roughly the same as in 2025, with a slight forward shift; predicted minimum ranking is about 324, with a range of 287 to 361.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law
- Engineering Experimental Class (Urban, Architecture and Creative Design, available for liberal arts).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Political Science and Administration
- Humanities Experimental Class (including German, English, Japanese, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Communication Studies, Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 287–361, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Political Science and Administration, Humanities Experimental Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Law, Architecture) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for the Law major.
